caption: A man with a shaved head, a beard, and tattoos on his arm is situated in a recording studio against a backdrop of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt. He is speaking into a professional silver microphone held by a black boom arm, which bears the text " Rode NT1-A". Throughout the sequence, the man is captured in mid-conversation, with his mouth open and eyes shifting as he speaks. He uses his hands to gesture for emphasis; in the early part of the clip, his right hand is blurred as it moves across his chest, and later, he raises his left hand toward his head. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium close-up shot of the man as he engages in his discussion.
